notes:
The 3.16.x won't start the game with the PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 so 3.7.8 is required. It runs smoothly on HIGH preset 1440p ~50FPS with occasional dips. 

The game also runs without the PROTON_USE_WINED3D and on 3.16.x but the frames fall much much more often. (assuming the reason behind this is the compilation of vulkan shaders) But it made the game unplayable.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: Game stuttered on missions when loading resources. Used https://github.com/jomihaka/dxvk-poe-hack installed by downloading the zip file under Releases and doing "protontricks 614570 --force setup_dxvk.verb" to install. In launch options used "DXVK_ASYNC=1 %command%" as mentioned in Dishonored 2 review. Game runs perfectly on ultra (vsync disabled) after that.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: Some smaller stutterings when entering new areas. Deside this, the game is very good playable on 60-70FPS
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: I played the whole game ~20hours and did not encounter any bug.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: Stutter in new areas briefly, game sometimes does not like alt+tab. Other than that runs pretty well.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: runs with no crashes or bugs, but performance leads much to be desired. Shader compilation stuttering was very bad at the beginning of the game, but went away in later levels as they were already cached. I could almost never hit 120FPS, even in cramped areas. FPS varied from 110 down to 50 in the worst spots (constant 50 staring at certain wide open areas with lots of objects). Overall I think the game is just poorly optimized and uses too many draw calls.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: Crashes on scenery change, opens up again and plays fine. Also there are a few fps drops.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: I've been playing the first level without any glitch. Performance is good
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: Stutters badly. Tried disabling Esync but it didn't help.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

notes: 27th Sep 2019 - runs out of box with PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1. Before that it was stuttering badly.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes:
I tried running the game using Proton 4.11-7, but it would freeze for a few seconds, several times a minute. Fixed by switching to Proton 3.7-8! I haven't tried other versions yet.

One problem still remains: frequent stuttering that happens when first loading an area, but goes away over time. I assume it's a shader cache being built.
title: Dishonored®: Death of the Outsider™
